Actions.Text: REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system in the town of Lewisboro, county of Westchester, to Nathaniel Reynolds
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system constituting state route thirty-five, beginning at its intersection with state route one hundred twenty-one and continuing to its intersection with North Salem road, in the town of Lewisboro, county of Westchester, to Nathaniel Reynolds.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system in the town of Lewisboro, county of Westchester, to Nathaniel Reynolds
